project.name: RPGlitch
project.description: RPGlitch is a high-fidelity, local-first roleplay simulation engine built as a Svelte 5 Progressive Web App. It features a reactive simulation core (Chrono/DynamicsEngine), an AI intelligence kernel, persistent IndexedDB storage via Dexie.js, and a Nordic Chalk Regime design system.

nodes.name: jules-auto.yml
nodes.summary: This GitHub Actions workflow orchestrates the 'Jules Sovereign Lifecycle' for the RPGlitch project, automating tasks like CI checks, AI agent dispatch (Jules bot for reactive and swarm operations), and scheduled hygiene/compliance checks.
nodes.languageNotes: The file extensively uses GitHub Actions YAML syntax, including event triggers, conditional job execution (`if`), environment variables, secrets, and reusable actions. It demonstrates advanced workflow orchestration patterns like concurrency control and dependency management between jobs (`needs`).

nodes.name: bayes-prompt-engineering.md
nodes.languageNotes: The documents use a mix of markdown for conceptual explanations and instructions, and implicitly reference JavaScript for `oc` API calls and client-side logic in the Perchance specification. The RPGlitch document also uses mathematical notation for probability and XML-like structures for configuration.

nodes.name: ETERNAL.md
nodes.languageNotes: The files utilize a highly structured Markdown format with extensive use of checklists, tables, and metaphorical section titles (e.g., 'Eternal (The Soul)', 'Present (The State)', 'Technical Soul'). They employ project-specific terminology like 'Chalk Regime', 'Perchance Two-Panel Paradigm', 'Reactive Monolith', 'Fractal RAG memory', and 'MCPs', indicative of a well-defined internal vocabulary for the RPGlitch codebase. Task descriptions are precise and often include file paths, demonstrating a clear link to the underlying code structure.

nodes.name: format_timestamp
nodes.summary: Formats a given timestamp into a standard Swedish/ISO-adjacent 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm' string.

nodes.name: toggle_mute
nodes.summary: Toggles the global audio mute state, preserving previous volume if unmuting.

nodes.name: log_action
nodes.summary: Logs a control panel action to the application's system log.

nodes.name: load_story
nodes.summary: Loads a specific story by ID, sets it as active, syncs runtime, refreshes the log, and switches to storymode view.

nodes.name: run_mock
nodes.summary: Simulates a mock turn by either a fractal or AI character, generating content and logging it as a system turn.

nodes.name: hard_reset
nodes.summary: Performs a complete hard reset by deleting the database and reloading the application window.

nodes.name: refresh_stories
nodes.summary: Asynchronously fetches and updates the local cache of available stories.

nodes.name: adjust_height
nodes.summary: Dynamically adjusts the height of the textarea to fit its content.

nodes.name: handle_send
nodes.summary: Handles sending user input, trimming whitespace, clearing the input, and passing it to the Chrono engine.

nodes.name: handle_keydown
nodes.summary: Captures keyboard events to send messages on Enter (without Shift) and prevent default form submission.

nodes.name: handle_window_keydown
nodes.summary: Captures window keyboard events to close the control panel on 'Escape'.

nodes.name: hex_hue
nodes.summary: Calculates the HSL hue (0-360) for a given hexadecimal color string, returning 361 for achromatic colors.

nodes.name: sync_modifiers
nodes.summary: Ensures the character's `modifiers` object and its required fields are properly initialized.

nodes.name: handle_creative_action
nodes.summary: Triggers AI enhancement for the active prompt field or extracts optics metadata if no prompt text is present.

nodes.name: handle_generate
nodes.summary: Initiates AI image generation based on the current prompt or opens an upload dialog if no prompt text exists.

nodes.name: handle_upload_portrait
nodes.summary: Handles manual image upload via a Perchance plugin and updates the character's profile picture.

nodes.name: prevent_default
nodes.summary: Prevents the default event behavior to maintain active focus states.

nodes.name: ensureModifiers
nodes.summary: Initializes or updates a character's modifiers object, ensuring all required fields are present with default values.

nodes.name: handleCreativeAction
nodes.summary: Simulates the logic for handling creative actions, such as enhancing a prompt or composing a base prompt.

nodes.name: spring
nodes.summary: Creates and returns a new `KineticSpring` instance, a Svelte 5 rune-compatible spring physics wrapper.

nodes.name: KineticSpring
nodes.summary: A native Svelte 5 class that implements a spring physics controller, managing an animated value with stiffness, damping, and precision.

nodes.name: index.js
nodes.summary: Source file in the RPGlitch codebase.

nodes.name: get_target
nodes.summary: Helper function to find the appropriate animation target element within a node.

nodes.name: createKineticAction
nodes.summary: A standardized manager for registering hover-triggered physical animations, synchronizing with global motion intensity and reduced motion preferences.

nodes.name: shimmy
nodes.summary: A Svelte action that applies a nervous, high-frequency jitter (rotation + translation) animation to an element on hover.

nodes.name: pulse
nodes.summary: A Svelte action that applies a looping 'Heartbeat' thump animation to an element on hover, with a return animation on mouse leave.

nodes.name: spin
nodes.summary: A Svelte action that applies a 90-degree rotation animation to an element, powered by spring physics.

nodes.name: roll
nodes.summary: A Svelte action that applies a full 360-degree rotation animation to an element, powered by spring physics.

nodes.name: stab
nodes.summary: A Svelte action that applies a quick horizontal thrust animation to an element on hover.

nodes.name: kinetic_scroll
nodes.summary: A Svelte action that enables drag-to-scroll functionality with momentum for an element.

nodes.name: kinetic.test.js
nodes.summary: Source file in the RPGlitch codebase.

nodes.name: normalize
nodes.summary: Normalizes text by stripping HTML tags, markdown formatting, and collapsing whitespace to detect clean content appends.

nodes.name: typewriter
nodes.summary: A Svelte action that safely types out sanitized HTML character-by-character within a target element, preserving HTML tags and truncating text nodes reactively.

nodes.name: is_disabled
nodes.summary: Determines if an entity card should be disabled due to identity allocation collisions across synchronized role slots.

nodes.name: handle_create_new
nodes.summary: Generates a pristine entity instance template via the Factory, upserts it to storage, selects it, and opens its profile.

nodes.name: handle_select
nodes.summary: Selects an entity for the current card hand type and closes the card hand overlay.

nodes.name: handle_keydown
nodes.summary: Closes the card hand overlay if the 'Escape' key is pressed while it's open.

nodes.name: index.js
nodes.summary: Source file in the RPGlitch codebase.

nodes.name: Layout.svelte
nodes.summary: Source file in the RPGlitch codebase.

nodes.name: handle_click_outside
nodes.summary: Handles click events outside the profile modal to check for unsaved changes or close the profile.

nodes.name: sync
nodes.summary: Synchronizes the character state when the application-level editing entity changes.

nodes.name: get_safe_value
nodes.summary: Safely retrieves a value from the `char` object using a dot-string path, returning an empty string if not found.

nodes.name: set_field_value
nodes.summary: Sets a value in the `char` object at a specified dot-string path and marks the profile as user-mutated.

nodes.name: handle_close
nodes.summary: Toggles editing mode or closes the profile, prompting for unsaved changes if necessary.

nodes.name: cancel
nodes.summary: Reverts all changes, exits editing mode, reloads the character from the original entity, and resets interaction tracking.

nodes.name: set_active_field
nodes.summary: Sets the currently active field context for interaction tracking.

nodes.name: reset_active_field
nodes.summary: Resets the active field context to its default state.

nodes.name: save
nodes.summary: Commits the current entity changes to the repository, updates global entity lists, and exits editing mode.

nodes.name: delete
nodes.summary: Deletes the current entity from the repository and closes the profile.

nodes.name: enhance
nodes.summary: Triggers an AI-enhanced text generation for a specific field if it has a value and is not already busy.

nodes.name: enhance_field_inner
nodes.summary: Executes the internal text enhancement mechanics for a specific field using an LLM service.

nodes.name: enhance_profile
nodes.summary: Triggers AI-enhanced text generation for the entire profile, populating multiple fields simultaneously.

nodes.name: add_vector_item
nodes.summary: Adds a new, initialized item to a specified vector array within the character's data.

nodes.name: patch_vector_item
nodes.summary: Applies a partial update (patch) to a specific item within a vector array.

nodes.name: remove_vector_item
nodes.summary: Removes an item at a given index from a specified vector array.

nodes.name: update_vector_weight
nodes.summary: Adjusts the emotional weight of a specific vector item within a defined range (1-10).

nodes.name: setImage
nodes.summary: Sets the character's profile picture and triggers immediate persistence to the database and runtime state.

nodes.name: ProfileState
nodes.summary: A Svelte 5 reactive class responsible for controlling the viewing, editing, saving, and deletion logic for entity profiles, integrating with application state and AI services.

nodes.name: profile.test.js
nodes.summary: Source file in the RPGlitch codebase.

nodes.name: update_tags
nodes.summary: Parses a raw comma-separated string into an array of tags and patches the vector item with these tags.

nodes.name: formatName
nodes.summary: Formats a raw name string, specifically making three-word names 'bottom-heavy' by inserting a newline for better visual balance.

nodes.name: Slot
nodes.summary: A Svelte snippet that renders either a Skeleton loader or an EntityCard for AI, User, or Fractal slots.

nodes.name: get_color
nodes.summary: Retrieves the signature color for a given entity.

nodes.name: handle_input
nodes.summary: Updates the custom_title state and sets `is_custom` to true based on user input in the contenteditable title.

nodes.name: handle_reset
nodes.summary: Resets the title to its dynamically generated state and triggers a re-roll.

nodes.name: Storymode.svelte
nodes.summary: Source file in the RPGlitch codebase.

nodes.name: map_role
nodes.summary: Maps database roles ('assistant', 'ai', 'prologue') to simplified UI sender archetypes ('ai', 'fractal', or original role).

nodes.name: handle_delete
nodes.summary: Initiates the deletion confirmation process for a specific story log entry.

nodes.name: execute_delete
nodes.summary: Executes the permanent deletion of a story log entry from the database via Chrono engine.

nodes.name: handle_edit
nodes.summary: Activates the editing state for a designated stream log index.

nodes.name: handle_save_edit
nodes.summary: Persists client-side text modifications for a log entry to the database via Chrono engine.

nodes.name: get_value
nodes.summary: Retrieves a value from a nested JavaScript object using a dot-string path.

nodes.name: set_value
nodes.summary: Sets a value within a nested JavaScript object using a dot-string path, mutating the object.

nodes.name: index.js
nodes.summary: Source file in the RPGlitch codebase.

nodes.name: parse_markdown
nodes.summary: Safely parses basic markdown (strong, emphasis, strong-emphasis, quote) from text into an array of paragraph blocks, each containing an array of inline tokens.

nodes.name: safe-html.js
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of JSDoc for type hinting across all JavaScript files, especially for Svelte actions, utility functions, and global interfaces. The Vite configuration leverages its plugin API for custom build steps, including shell command execution and file manipulation. Vitest test files extensively use `vi.mock` and `vi.spyOn` for comprehensive unit testing, particularly to mock browser APIs like `window.getComputedStyle` for JSDOM environments, and handle complex variable resolution within tests.

tour.title: Configuration Layer
tour.description: CI/CD workflows and GitHub configuration. Key files: jules-auto.yml.

tour.title: Data Layer
tour.description: Data models, database access, and Dexie persistence. Key files: bayes-prompt-engineering.md, memory-idea.md, perchance-ai-chat.md, somatic-psychology-engine.md, interaction-audit.md.

tour.title: Core
tour.description: Core application files. Key files: .env.example, .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc, .markdownlint.json, DESIGN.md, GEMINI.md.

tour.title: Documentation & Tooling
tour.description: Agent skills, project docs, and tooling. Key files: ETERNAL.md, FUTURE.md, PRESENT.md, config.yaml, SKILL.md.

tour.title: Intelligence Layer
tour.description: AI kernel, simulation engine, and core orchestration logic. Key files: boot.js, boot.test.js, chrono.svelte.js, chrono.test.js, config.js.

tour.title: Sensory Layer
tour.description: Animations, media, and sensory output. Key files: audio.svelte.js, design.css, index.js, optics.js, resilience.js.

tour.title: State Layer
tour.description: Reactive state management (Svelte 5 Runes). Key files: app.svelte.js, app.test.js, index.js, log.svelte.js, runtime.svelte.js.

tour.title: UI Layer
tour.description: User interface components (atomic design). Key files: Backdrop.svelte, Button.svelte, DataBox.svelte, Dropdown.svelte, DynamicsMeter.svelte.

tour.title: Utility Layer
tour.description: Shared utilities and helpers. Key files: field-path.js, index.js, markdown.js, safe-html.js, safe-html.test.js.
